/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libsylar.so -o ../lib/libsylar.so CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/sylar/config.cc.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/sylar/fiber.cc.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/sylar/log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/sylar/scheduler.cc.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/sylar/thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/sylar/util.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/lib
